Border Options - Patches ▼

These are the border options available for patches. If you do not select a border option we will choose the border best suited to your artwork.

Merrowed

Border Options - Patches

A 1/8” border that overlocks the patch edge, preventing fraying. For large, simple shapes like circles and shields. Provides stability and prevents curling.

Hot Knife Cut

Border Options - Patches

This border allows for custom shapes and is cut to shape.

Satin Stitch

Border Options - Patches

This stitched border is used to mimic a merrowed border when a merrowed border is not available.

Metallic Thread

Additional Options - Patches

Additional Options - Patches

Button Loop

Border Options - Patches ▼

These are the border options available for patches. If you do not select a border option we will choose the border best suited to your artwork.

Merrowed

Border Options - Patches

A 1/8” border that overlocks the patch edge, preventing fraying. For large, simple shapes like circles and shields. Provides stability and prevents curling.

Hot Knife Cut

Border Options - Patches

This border allows for custom shapes and is cut to shape.

Satin Stitch

Border Options - Patches

This stitched border is used to mimic a merrowed border when a merrowed border is not available.

Border Options - Patches ▼

These are the border options available for patches. If you do not select a border option we will choose the border best suited to your artwork.

Merrowed

Border Options - Patches

A 1/8” border that overlocks the patch edge, preventing fraying. For large, simple shapes like circles and shields. Provides stability and prevents curling.

Hot Knife Cut

Border Options - Patches

This border allows for custom shapes and is cut to shape.

Satin Stitch

Border Options - Patches

This stitched border is used to mimic a merrowed border when a merrowed border is not available.

Additional Options - Patches ▼

Metallic Thread

Additional Options - Patches

Metallic thread is an additional charge of $1.00 (R) run charge per unit The metallic threads are listed below for reference: T901 (Gold) & T902 (Silver)

More than 8 Thread Colors

Additional Options - Patches

This option is if you require more than 8 thread colors. Please note that the charge is per additional color/per patch.

$0.09 each

Button Loop

Additional Options - Patches

This creates a button loop at the top of the patch so it can be hung on a button instead of sewn onto fabric.

$0.14 each

Border Options - Patches ▼

These are the border options available for patches. If you do not select a border option we will choose the border best suited to your artwork.

Merrowed

Border Options - Patches

A 1/8” border that overlocks the patch edge, preventing fraying. For large, simple shapes like circles and shields. Provides stability and prevents curling.

Hot Knife Cut

Border Options - Patches

This border allows for custom shapes and is cut to shape.

Satin Stitch

Border Options - Patches

This stitched border is used to mimic a merrowed border when a merrowed border is not available.

Border Options - Patches ▼

These are the border options available for patches. If you do not select a border option we will choose the border best suited to your artwork.

Merrowed

Border Options - Patches

A 1/8” border that overlocks the patch edge, preventing fraying. For large, simple shapes like circles and shields. Provides stability and prevents curling.

Hot Knife Cut

Border Options - Patches

This border allows for custom shapes and is cut to shape.

Satin Stitch

Border Options - Patches

This stitched border is used to mimic a merrowed border when a merrowed border is not available.

Additional Options - Patches ▼

Metallic Thread

Additional Options - Patches

Metallic thread is an additional charge of $1.00 (R) run charge per unit The metallic threads are listed below for reference: T901 (Gold) & T902 (Silver)

More than 8 Thread Colors

Additional Options - Patches

This option is if you require more than 8 thread colors. Please note that the charge is per additional color/per patch.

$0.09 each

Button Loop

Additional Options - Patches

This creates a button loop at the top of the patch so it can be hung on a button instead of sewn onto fabric.

b164723a-4709-417c-994d-041edd6f5181.salesToolsHtml:
Pitch this SKU — Custom Embroidered Patches (4-1/2"). Lead with use case (uniforms, retail, teams, recognition), then minimums and timeline. Reference included services from “Price includes” in the Description tab when present (e.g. setup, virtual proof, shipping offers).

  • Quote style PEMB45 on proposals and POs.
  • Offer virtual proofs and artwork checks before production.
  • Cross-sell with hats, bags, or jackets for kit programs.
  • For gradient or photo-real art, steer toward dye sublimated or woven; for 3D brand marks, PVC or embroidered.

Approved partners can request internal sell sheets, comparison matrices, and margin guidance from the A Design Line team.
